Functions for creating and populating ANCS notification items with attributes and actions in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The code is a C source file that manages the creation and population of `TimelineItem` structures with attributes and actions related to Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS) notifications. It includes functions to handle various attributes such as titles, subtitles, messages, and app identifiers, as well as actions like positive and negative responses to notifications. The code integrates with internationalization utilities and handles multimedia indicators, ensuring that notifications are formatted correctly with optional ellipses for truncated text.

Key components include functions like [`prv_fill_native_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_native_ancs_action>) and [`prv_populate_attributes`](<#prv_populate_attributes>), which populate the `TimelineItem` with necessary attributes and actions. The code also manages memory allocation for these attributes and actions, ensuring that buffers are correctly sized and populated. It supports both native ANCS actions and custom actions specific to the Pebble platform, with logic to handle specific cases like group SMS and voicemail notifications. The file is intended to be part of a larger system that processes and displays notifications on a device, likely a smartwatch or similar device that interfaces with iOS notifications.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `ancs_item.h`
- `ancs_notifications_util.h`
- `applib/graphics/utf8.h`
- `kernel/pbl_malloc.h`
- `services/common/i18n/i18n.h`
- `system/logging.h`
- `util/string.h`
- `stdio.h`


# Global Variables

---
### NUM\_NATIVE\_ANCS\_ACTION\_ATTRS
- **Type**: ``int``
- **Description**: Defines the number of native ANCS (Apple Notification Center Service) action attributes used in the application. It is set to a constant value of 2.
- **Use**: Used to specify the number of attributes associated with native ANCS actions in the application.


---
### s\_utf8\_ellipsis
- **Type**: ``char[]``
- **Description**: A static constant character array that stores the UTF-8 encoded ellipsis string. The array is null-terminated.
- **Use**: Used to append an ellipsis to strings when truncation is necessary.


# Functions

### prv\_add\_ellipsis<!-- {{#callable:prv_add_ellipsis}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L39>)

Appends a UTF-8 ellipsis to a specified position in a buffer and returns the length of the ellipsis.
- **Inputs**:
    - `buffer`: A pointer to a character array where the ellipsis will be appended.
    - `length`: An integer representing the position in the buffer where the ellipsis will be added.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Copy the null-terminated UTF-8 ellipsis string `s_utf8_ellipsis` to the buffer starting at the specified `length` position using `memcpy`.
    - Return the length of the ellipsis string using `strlen`.
- **Output**: Returns the length of the UTF-8 ellipsis string.


---
### prv\_should\_add\_sender\_attr<!-- {{#callable:prv_should_add_sender_attr}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L45>)

Determines if a sender attribute should be added based on the application ID and title attributes.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the application ID.
    - ``title``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the title.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Checks if the application ID corresponds to an SMS or phone application using [`ancs_notifications_util_is_sms`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_sms>) or [`ancs_notifications_util_is_phone`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_phone>).
    - Verifies that the `title` is not null and its length is greater than zero.
    - Returns true if both conditions are met, otherwise returns false.
- **Output**: A boolean value indicating whether to add the sender attribute.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ancs_notifications_util_is_sms`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_sms>)
    - [`ancs_notifications_util_is_phone`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_phone>)

### prv\_copy\_pstring\_and\_add\_ellipsis<!-- {{#callable:prv_copy_pstring_and_add_ellipsis}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L54>)

Copies a Pascal string to a buffer and optionally adds an ellipsis.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``pstring``: A pointer to a `PascalString16` structure containing the string to copy.
    - ``buffer``: A pointer to a character array where the string will be copied.
    - ``add_ellipsis``: A boolean flag indicating whether to add an ellipsis to the copied string.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calculate the initial number of bytes to add as the length of the string plus one for the null terminator.
    - Convert the Pascal string to a C-style string and copy it into the buffer using `pstring_pstring16_to_string`.
    - If `add_ellipsis` is true, call [`prv_add_ellipsis`](<#prv_add_ellipsis>) to append an ellipsis to the buffer and update the `bytes_added` count.
    - Return a pointer to the position in the buffer after the added bytes.
- **Output**: A pointer to the end of the copied string in the buffer, including any added ellipsis.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_add_ellipsis`](<#prv_add_ellipsis>)


---
### prv\_max\_ellipsified\_cstring\_size<!-- {{#callable:prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L64>)

Calculates the maximum size of a C-style string with an ellipsis added, based on the length of the given `ANCSAttribute`.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``attr``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure, which contains a `length` field representing the length of the attribute.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `attr` is `NULL` or if `attr->length` is 0; if so, return 0.
    - Calculate the size by adding `attr->length`, the length of `s_utf8_ellipsis`, and 1 for the null terminator.
    - Return the calculated size as a `size_t`.
- **Output**: Returns the maximum size of the ellipsified C-style string as a `size_t`.

### prv\_add\_pstring\_to\_attribute<!-- {{#callable:prv_add_pstring_to_attribute}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L71>)

Adds a Pascal string to an attribute and optionally appends an ellipsis if the string length matches the maximum length.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``buffer``: A pointer to a buffer where the Pascal string will be copied.
    - ``ancs_attr``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure containing the Pascal string to be added.
    - ``max_length``: An integer representing the maximum allowed length for the string.
    - ``attribute``: A pointer to an `Attribute` structure where the string will be initialized.
    - ``attribute_id``: An `AttributeId` value that identifies the attribute being processed.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize the `attribute` with the string from `buffer` and the given `attribute_id` using [`attribute_init_string`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_init_string>).
    - Call [`prv_copy_pstring_and_add_ellipsis`](<#prv_copy_pstring_and_add_ellipsis>) to copy the Pascal string from `ancs_attr` to `buffer`, adding an ellipsis if `ancs_attr->length` equals `max_length`.
    - Return the updated `buffer` pointer.
- **Output**: A pointer to the updated buffer after the Pascal string and optional ellipsis have been added.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`attribute_init_string`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_init_string>)
    - [`prv_copy_pstring_and_add_ellipsis`](<#prv_copy_pstring_and_add_ellipsis>)

### prv\_add\_action\_msg\_to\_attribute<!-- {{#callable:prv_add_action_msg_to_attribute}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L79>)

Formats a notification attribute by combining sender, action message, and optionally a caption, into a buffer.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``buffer``: A pointer to a buffer where the formatted attribute string will be stored.
    - ``sender``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure containing the sender's information.
    - ``sender_max_length``: The maximum length allowed for the sender's information.
    - ``caption``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure containing the caption information, which can be optional.
    - ``caption_max_length``: The maximum length allowed for the caption.
    - ``action_msg``: A string containing the action message to be included in the attribute.
    - ``attribute``: A pointer to an `Attribute` structure where the formatted string will be initialized.
    - ``attribute_id``: An `AttributeId` value that identifies the attribute being formatted.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initializes the `attribute` with the `buffer` and `attribute_id` using [`attribute_init_string`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_init_string>).
    - Checks if `caption` is provided and has a length greater than zero, then converts it to a string and strips leading whitespace.
    - Calculates the maximum message length based on the sender, caption, and predefined constants.
    - Formats the sender and action message into the `buffer` using `snprintf`.
    - If the caption is not empty, appends it to the `buffer` in quotes, and adds an ellipsis if the caption length equals `caption_max_length`.
    - Returns a pointer to the end of the formatted string in the `buffer`.
- **Output**: A pointer to the position in the `buffer` immediately after the formatted attribute string.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`attribute_init_string`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_init_string>)
    - [`prv_add_ellipsis`](<#prv_add_ellipsis>)


---
### prv\_set\_multimedia\_action\_msg<!-- {{#callable:prv_set_multimedia_action_msg}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L116>)

Formats a multimedia action message with an optional emoji and stores it in a buffer.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``buffer``: A pointer to a character array where the formatted message will be stored.
    - ``length``: The size of the `buffer` to ensure the message does not exceed this length.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Checks if the `PLATFORM_TINTIN` macro is defined to determine the emoji string to use.
    - If `PLATFORM_TINTIN` is defined, sets `emoji_str` to an empty string.
    - If `PLATFORM_TINTIN` is not defined, sets `emoji_str` to a string containing a space or newline followed by the multimedia emoji, depending on the platform's shape.
    - Calls `snprintf` to format the message 'sent an attachment' with the `emoji_str` and store it in `buffer`.
- **Output**: Returns the number of characters written to `buffer`, not including the null terminator.

### prv\_fill\_native\_ancs\_action<!-- {{#callable:prv_fill_native_ancs_action}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L129>)

Fills a `TimelineItemAction` with attributes based on ANCS action ID and properties, and optionally allocates a buffer for the action title.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``buffer``: A pointer to a pointer to a buffer where the action title will be stored; if null, a new buffer is allocated.
    - ``action``: A pointer to a `TimelineItemAction` structure to be filled with attributes.
    - ``ancs_action_id``: An `ActionId` indicating the type of ANCS action to be performed.
    - ``title``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` containing the title of the action.
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` containing the application ID.
    - ``properties``: An `ANCSProperty` indicating additional properties of the action, such as whether it is a voicemail.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if the application is a phone app using [`ancs_notifications_util_is_phone`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_phone>) and determine if it is a voicemail.
    - Set the `action->type` based on `ancs_action_id` and whether the app is a phone app or voicemail.
    - Set the first attribute in `action->attr_list` to `AttributeIdAncsAction` with the value of `ancs_action_id`.
    - Allocate a new buffer for the title if `*buffer` is null, using `task_malloc_check` and [`prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size`](<#prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size>).
    - Add the title to the second attribute in `action->attr_list` using [`prv_add_pstring_to_attribute`](<#prv_add_pstring_to_attribute>).
    - Rename the action title from "Clear" to "Dismiss" or from "Dial" to "Call Back" using `i18n_get` if applicable.
- **Output**: Returns a pointer to the end of the buffer after the title has been added.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ancs_notifications_util_is_phone`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_phone>)
    - [`prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size`](<#prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size>)
    - [`prv_add_pstring_to_attribute`](<#prv_add_pstring_to_attribute>)


---
### prv\_fill\_pebble\_ancs\_action<!-- {{#callable:prv_fill_pebble_ancs_action}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L175>)

Copies attributes from a `TimelineItemAction` to another and updates a buffer pointer.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``buffer``: A pointer to a pointer to a buffer where attributes will be copied.
    - ``buf_end``: A pointer to the end of the buffer.
    - ``action``: A pointer to the `TimelineItemAction` where attributes will be copied to.
    - ``pbl_action``: A pointer to the `TimelineItemAction` from which attributes will be copied.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Set the `type` and `id` of `action` to match `pbl_action`.
    - Initialize `cur_attribute` to point to the first attribute in `action`'s attribute list.
    - Iterate over each attribute in `pbl_action`'s attribute list.
    - For each attribute, call [`attribute_copy`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_copy>) to copy it to `cur_attribute`, updating `buffer` and `buf_end` as needed.
    - Increment `cur_attribute` to point to the next attribute in `action`'s attribute list.
    - Return the updated `buffer` pointer.
- **Output**: Returns the updated buffer pointer after copying attributes.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`attribute_copy`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_copy>)

### prv\_populate\_attributes<!-- {{#callable:prv_populate_attributes}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L191>)

Populates a `TimelineItem` with attributes based on provided ANCS attributes and metadata, handling multimedia and group SMS cases.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``item``: A pointer to a `TimelineItem` structure to populate with attributes.
    - ``buffer``: A double pointer to a buffer where attribute strings will be stored.
    - ``title``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the title of the notification.
    - ``display_name``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the display name of the app.
    - ``subtitle``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the subtitle of the notification.
    - ``message``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the message body of the notification.
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the app identifier.
    - ``app_metadata``: A pointer to an `ANCSAppMetadata` structure containing app metadata like icon ID and color.
    - ``has_multimedia``: A boolean indicating if the notification includes multimedia content.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize `attr_idx` to 0 to track the index of attributes being added.
    - Check if the sender attribute should be added using [`prv_should_add_sender_attr`](<#prv_should_add_sender_attr>); if true, add the title as the sender attribute and increment `attr_idx`.
    - Assign `title` to `sender` and handle multimedia cases by adjusting `title` and `subtitle` based on group SMS status.
    - Add `title`, `display_name`, and `subtitle` attributes to the `item` if they are non-null and have a positive length, incrementing `attr_idx` for each.
    - For multimedia messages, construct an action message and add it to the body attribute; otherwise, add the `message` attribute if it is non-null and has a positive length.
    - Add the `app_id` attribute if it is non-null and has a positive length.
    - Add the icon attribute using `app_metadata->icon_id` and increment `attr_idx`.
    - If `PBL_COLOR` is defined and `app_metadata->app_color` is non-zero, add a background color attribute.
- **Output**: No return value; modifies the `TimelineItem` and `buffer` in place.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_should_add_sender_attr`](<#prv_should_add_sender_attr>)
    - [`prv_add_pstring_to_attribute`](<#prv_add_pstring_to_attribute>)
    - [`ancs_notifications_util_is_group_sms`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_group_sms>)
    - [`prv_set_multimedia_action_msg`](<#prv_set_multimedia_action_msg>)
    - [`prv_add_action_msg_to_attribute`](<#prv_add_action_msg_to_attribute>)


---
### prv\_should\_hide\_reply\_because\_group\_sms<!-- {{#callable:prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L275>)

Determines if a reply should be hidden for a group SMS action.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``action``: A pointer to a `TimelineItemAction` structure that represents the action to evaluate.
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the application ID.
    - ``subtitle``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the subtitle of the notification.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if the `action` type is not equal to `TimelineItemActionTypeAncsResponse`; if true, return `false`.
    - Call [`ancs_notifications_util_is_group_sms`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_group_sms>) with `app_id` and `subtitle` as arguments and return its result.
- **Output**: Returns `true` if the action is a group SMS and should hide the reply, otherwise returns `false`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ancs_notifications_util_is_group_sms`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_group_sms>)

### prv\_populate\_actions<!-- {{#callable:prv_populate_actions}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L285>)

Populates a `TimelineItem` with actions based on provided attributes and conditions.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``item``: A pointer to a `TimelineItem` structure where actions will be populated.
    - ``buffer``: A double pointer to a buffer where action attributes will be stored.
    - ``buf_end``: A pointer to the end of the buffer to ensure actions do not overflow.
    - ``positive_action``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the positive action label.
    - ``negative_action``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the negative action label.
    - ``subtitle``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the subtitle of the notification.
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` representing the application identifier.
    - ``pebble_actions``: A pointer to a `TimelineItemActionGroup` containing additional actions specific to Pebble.
    - ``properties``: An `ANCSProperty` value representing properties of the notification.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize a pointer `action` to the first action in the `item`'s action group.
    - If `positive_action` is not null, call [`prv_fill_native_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_native_ancs_action>) to fill the action with positive action details and increment `action`.
    - If `negative_action` is not null, call [`prv_fill_native_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_native_ancs_action>) to fill the action with negative action details and increment `action`.
    - If `pebble_actions` is not null, iterate over each action in `pebble_actions`.
    - For each `pebble_action`, check if it should be hidden using [`prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms`](<#prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms>).
    - If not hidden, call [`prv_fill_pebble_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_pebble_ancs_action>) to fill the action with Pebble-specific action details and increment `action`.
- **Output**: No return value; modifies the `item` and `buffer` in place.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`prv_fill_native_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_native_ancs_action>)
    - [`prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms`](<#prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms>)
    - [`prv_fill_pebble_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_pebble_ancs_action>)

### ancs\_item\_create\_and\_populate<!-- {{#callable:ancs_item_create_and_populate}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L320>)

Creates and populates a `TimelineItem` with notification attributes, app metadata, and actions.
- **Inputs**:
    - `notif_attributes`: An array of `ANCSAttribute` pointers representing notification attributes.
    - `app_attributes`: An array of `ANCSAttribute` pointers representing application attributes.
    - `app_metadata`: A pointer to `ANCSAppMetadata` containing metadata about the application.
    - `notif_prefs`: A pointer to `iOSNotifPrefs` containing notification preferences.
    - `timestamp`: A `time_t` value representing the timestamp for the notification.
    - `properties`: An `ANCSProperty` value representing properties of the notification.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Extracts `app_id`, `display_name`, and `title` from `notif_attributes` and `app_attributes` arrays.
    - Checks for multimedia content and deduplicates `title` and `display_name` if they are the same.
    - Determines the required space for strings by calculating the maximum size needed for each attribute, including potential ellipses for truncated strings.
    - Counts the number of actions, both native and custom, and prepares an array to store the number of attributes per action.
    - Creates a `TimelineItem` with the calculated number of attributes and actions, allocating a buffer for the item.
    - Populates the `TimelineItem` with attributes using [`prv_populate_attributes`](<#prv_populate_attributes>), adjusting for multimedia and sender attributes.
    - Populates actions using [`prv_populate_actions`](<#prv_populate_actions>), ensuring the order of actions is consistent with the expected order.
    - Returns the populated `TimelineItem` or `NULL` if memory allocation fails.
- **Output**: A pointer to a `TimelineItem` structure, or `NULL` if memory allocation fails.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ancs_notifications_util_is_sms`](<ancs_notifications_util.c.md#ancs_notifications_util_is_sms>)
    - [`prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size`](<#prv_max_ellipsified_cstring_size>)
    - [`prv_should_add_sender_attr`](<#prv_should_add_sender_attr>)
    - [`prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms`](<#prv_should_hide_reply_because_group_sms>)
    - [`attribute_list_get_buffer_size`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_list_get_buffer_size>)
    - [`timeline_item_create`](<../../timeline/item.c.md#timeline_item_create>)
    - [`prv_populate_attributes`](<#prv_populate_attributes>)
    - [`prv_populate_actions`](<#prv_populate_actions>)

### ancs\_item\_update\_dismiss\_action<!-- {{#callable:ancs_item_update_dismiss_action}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_item.c#L459>)

Updates the dismiss action of a timeline item with a specified ANCS negative action.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``item``: A pointer to a `TimelineItem` structure that represents the timeline item to update.
    - ``uid``: A `uint32_t` value representing the unique identifier to associate with the ANCS action.
    - ``attr_action_neg``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure that contains the negative action attributes to apply to the dismiss action.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Finds the dismiss action in the given `TimelineItem` using [`timeline_item_find_dismiss_action`](<../../timeline/item.c.md#timeline_item_find_dismiss_action>).
    - If a dismiss action is found, initializes its attribute list with `NUM_NATIVE_ANCS_ACTION_ATTRS + 1` attributes.
    - Calls [`prv_fill_native_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_native_ancs_action>) to fill the dismiss action with the negative action attributes.
    - Sets the ANCS ID attribute in the dismiss action's attribute list to the provided `uid`.
    - Copies the timeline item to a new item using [`timeline_item_copy`](<../../timeline/item.c.md#timeline_item_copy>).
    - Frees the temporary string buffer and destroys the attribute list of the dismiss action.
    - Frees the allocated buffer of the original item and replaces it with the new item.
    - Destroys the new item after copying its contents back to the original item.
- **Output**: No return value; the function modifies the `item` in place.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`timeline_item_find_dismiss_action`](<../../timeline/item.c.md#timeline_item_find_dismiss_action>)
    - [`attribute_list_init_list`](<../../timeline/attribute.c.md#attribute_list_init_list>)
    - [`prv_fill_native_ancs_action`](<#prv_fill_native_ancs_action>)
    - [`timeline_item_copy`](<../../timeline/item.c.md#timeline_item_copy>)
